Description.Name: The Last Step
Description.Details: The perimeter is breached. [[DM.Factions[faction_RemembranceCell],Remembrance Cell]] defenders lie scattered across the frozen landscape. The MechWarriors are exhausted, but there is no time to rest. Darius pulls up damage assessments. "Boss, we're in bad shape. Armor compromised, crew fatigued. We're going into the next fight far from ideal circumstances." The production facility looms ahead through the snowfall. Somewhere inside, Joanna McEvedy waits with the Armageddon weapon. Marcus's voice comes through on the comm. "Commander, let's finish this. It is time to destroy the prototype, or I will have to detonate the warhead. See you on the other side." The final battle begins now. [A new contract is available in the Command Center]

Description.Name: [The final battle begins]
Description.Details: [A new contract is available in the Command Center]
